name: ExchangeRate_get_latest_rates
description: Get current foreign exchange rates for 166 currencies using the ExchangeRate-API free endpoint. Returns all exchange rates relative to a base currency. Data updated daily from IMF, ECB, and other sources. No authentication required. Useful for currency conversion, financial analysis, and international pricing.

base.description: Base currency ISO 4217 code to get rates relative to. Examples: 'USD' (US Dollar), 'EUR' (Euro), 'GBP' (British Pound), 'JPY' (Japanese Yen), 'CNY' (Chinese Yuan), 'AUD', 'CAD', 'CHF', 'INR'

data.description: Exchange rates relative to the base currency

rates.description: Map of currency code to exchange rate
